notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson singles on a ground ball to third baseman Carlos Correa. Jacob Wilson to 2nd. Jacob Wilson advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Carlos Correa.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker homers (2) on a fly ball to left field. Shea Langeliers scores. Tyler Soderstrom scores.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, shortstop Nick Allen to first baseman Christian Walker. Nick Kurtz to 3rd. Shea Langeliers out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, shortstop Nick Allen to first baseman Christian Walker. Nick Kurtz to 3rd. Shea Langeliers out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Yainer Diaz challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Nick Kurtz steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Lance McCullers Jr. on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
